title: LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES - 211info
text: SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES REDMOND LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides overnight shelter, community meals 3 times per day, showers, laundry and a clothing closet. Individual case management services for housing, employment, recovery, mental health care, medical treatment and life goals are also available on a case by case basis. Residents can participate in faith based fellowship and discussion groups. Well-behaved pets allowed with owner supervision. 1350 S Highway 97 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Adults aged 18 and older and families with minorchildren. Unaccompanied youth under 18 not eligible. Well-behaved pets allowed with owner supervision. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Meals 7 days per week: Breakfast 7am-8am; Lunch Noon-1pm; Dinner 6pm-7pm Shelter check-in 7 days per week: 5:30pm-10pm; assigned beds guaranteed only until 8pm Discussion/instruction hours: Monday-Friday 8am-11am Email (541) 548-1772 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 548-1772 Main phone (541) 548-1772 Ext: 2 Kitchen (541) 548-1772 Ext: 3 Case Management (541) 548-1772 Ext: 1 Intake Open 5pm-7am Main phone (541) 548-1772 Kitchen (541) 548-1772 ext 2 Case Management (541) 548-1772 ext 3 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Nightly sign-in during intake hours; weapons must be disclosed and checked in during shelter stay. No background check or substance testing, but alcohol and controlled substances are not permitted. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Redmond Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind Cindy's Chinese Food and Verizon on the corner of Veteran's and S Highway 97. Services: Camping Gear Donation Programs Case/Care Management * Homelessness Issues Clothing Donation Programs Community Meals Community Shelters Donation Drop Off Points Food Donation Programs Homeless Drop In Centers Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Showers/Baths If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES REDMOND
